would-you-rather-friendship-test.question: Would you rather tell your friend a harsh truth OR lie to protect their feelings?
Would you rather forgive your friend immediately OR hold a grudge for a long time?
Would you rather tell your friend they’ve changed for the worse OR say nothing?
Would you rather be the therapist friend OR the fun friend?
Would you rather tell your friend they smell bad OR avoid saying anything?
Would you rather tell your friend they’re the problem OR blame the situation?
Would you rather let a friendship fade naturally OR have an awkward we need to talk?
Would you rather choose a fun but unreliable friend OR a boring but loyal one?
Would you rather tell your friend you don’t trust them OR pretend everything’s fine?
Would you rather have one ride-or-die friend OR a big group of casual friends?
Would you rather let your friend embarrass themselves OR step in and stop them?
Would you rather share your success even if it makes your friend jealous OR downplay it?
Would you rather always be brutally honest OR always sugarcoat things?
Would you rather keep a secret that hurts someone else OR expose it and betray your friend?
Would you rather pick a side in a friend group conflict OR stay neutral?
Would you rather let your friend take credit for your idea OR speak up and claim it?
Would you rather be friends with someone your best friend hates OR cut them off?
Would you rather choose your best friend OR your partner in a tough situation?
Would you rather snitch on your friend to save yourself OR stay loyal and face the consequences together?
Would you rather tell your friend their partner is cheating OR stay out of it?
Would you rather prioritise your mental health OR always be there for your friend?
Would you rather let your friend make a big mistake OR intervene and risk conflict?
Would you rather defend your friend even when they’re wrong OR call them out?
Would you rather tell your friend their new haircut looks bad OR pretend you like it?
Would you rather have a friend who always needs you OR one who never does?
Would you rather confront your friend about gossiping OR ignore it?
Would you rather always initiate plans OR wait and see if they make the effort?
Would you rather tell your friend they’re being annoying OR just tolerate it?
Would you rather tell your friend you feel replaced OR keep it to yourself?
Would you rather let your friend win to keep the peace OR compete seriously?
Would you rather be the backup friend OR have no friend group at all?
Would you rather be in constant contact OR only talk occasionally but deeply?
Would you rather tell your friend they’re in the wrong relationship OR support them anyway?
Would you rather let your friend copy your work OR say no and risk tension?
Would you rather be the friend who apologises first OR wait for the other person?
Would you rather be the friend who checks in daily OR only when it matters?
Would you rather let your friend interrupt you constantly OR call it out?
Would you rather tell your friend you don’t enjoy spending time with them anymore OR slowly drift away?
Would you rather always match your friend’s energy OR stay true to yourself?
Would you rather tell your friend you don’t like their partner OR keep it to yourself?
Would you rather tell your friend their partner flirted with you OR ignore it?
Would you rather let your friend cancel plans for their partner OR call it out?
Would you rather lend your friend money knowing you won’t get it back OR say no and feel guilty?
Would you rather split the bill evenly OR pay only for what you ordered?
Would you rather exclude one friend to keep the vibe good OR invite them and risk awkwardness?
Would you rather stick with your group OR branch out and meet new people?
Would you rather be secretly jealous of your friend OR feel like they’re jealous of you?
Would you rather compete with your friend OR always support them?
Would you rather make time for a busy friend OR stop trying?
Would you rather say no and disappoint your friend OR say yes and drain yourself?
Would you rather call your friend out for embarrassing you OR laugh it off?
Would you rather post an embarrassing photo of your friend OR keep it private?
Would you rather argue it out immediately OR take space and revisit later?
Would you rather act nice around people you don’t like OR be openly distant?
Would you rather lend your friend something valuable OR say no and seem selfish?
Would you rather cover your friend’s mistake at work OR let them deal with the consequences?
Would you rather feel overshadowed by your friend OR feel like you’re outgrowing them?
Would you rather be more successful than your friend OR have them be more successful than you?
Would you rather support your friend publicly but feel competitive privately OR be openly competitive?
Would you rather side with the majority OR stick with the friend you agree with?
Would you rather be the leader of the group OR go with the flow?
Would you rather leave a group chat dramatically OR silently mute it?
Would you rather tell your friend their partner is holding them back OR stay out of it?
Would you rather let your friend choose their partner over you OR confront them about it?
